display.purpose: Hero headline only, one per page.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav items, tags — not a per-section eyebrow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition easing, carried forward from the existing --ax-transition token.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal and hero entrance easing — exponential ease-out, no bounce/elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The rare accent moment — one per section maximum.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #A78BFA; color: #08080A; padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8B7CF6; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(167,139,250,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFFFFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action, transparent with a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #0F0F13; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFFFFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Default content card — no border, no shadow, depth via tone step only.
components.html:
Real-time notifications

Every call, every lead, logged the moment it happens.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #0F0F13; border-radius: 20px; padding: 40px; transition: background 0.3s ease; } .ds-card:hover { background: #17171C; } .ds-card__title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #FFFFFF; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card__body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #9A9AA6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Sticky Nav
components.description: Pinned header, translucent void-black with backdrop blur, hairline appears only after scroll starts.
components.html:
Axon Core
PricingHow it works
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 16px 32px; background: rgba(8,8,10,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-radius: 999px; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav--scrolled { border-bottom-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-nav__logo { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; color: #FFFFFF; font-size: 1.1rem; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav__links a { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #9A9AA6; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav__links a:hover { color: #FFFFFF; }

narrative.overview: Axon Core sells trust, not spectacle: an SME owner in Singapore is deciding whether to let an AI answer their phones and handle their customers' money-generating calls for the next 36 months. The system reads as a restrained, near-black canvas where confidence comes from typographic discipline and generous space, not decoration. Riley, the AI voice agent, is present as a felt intelligence rather than a stated one: a quiet, dark node-graph motif evokes a mind quietly listening and connecting, without ever being labelled 'neural network' or 'AI brain' on the page. This system explicitly rejects the site's own previous default: a page-wide purple wash, colored border lines separating every section, and a purple glow sweeping in on every scroll trigger.
keyCharacteristics: Void-black base, near-monochrome — color is earned, not default
One accent (signal violet) used on primary actions and select headline words only
Depth via tonal layering, not drop shadows
The node-graph motif is the system's one recurring signature, used sparingly
Serif display paired with sans body — contrast carries elegance without color

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Violet appears on ≤10% of any given viewport. If more than one element on screen is violet-filled, remove one.

rules.name: The No-Color-Dividers Rule
rules.body: Sections separate via whitespace and, rarely, a single Hairline rule — never a colored border, never a repeated glow sweep on every section boundary.

rules.name: The Restraint Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Display heading never exceeds clamp() max of 5.5rem and letter-spacing never goes tighter than -0.04em.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: An element earns a lighter surface tone by being logically closer to the user — never by an arbitrary shadow.

dos: Do separate sections with whitespace as the default, only.
Do keep Signal Violet to ≤10% of any viewport.
Do use tonal layering for all depth.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
Do verify Static Grey body text hits ≥4.5:1 contrast before shipping.
donts: Don't reuse a colored border variable as a section-to-section divider.
Don't let a purple radial-gradient sweep fire on every section as it scrolls into view.
Don't fill an empty-feeling section with more small icons/copy — fill it with one considered thing.

Don't use gradient text, side-stripe colored borders, glassmorphism as decoration, identical icon-card grids, a tiny uppercase eyebrow above every section, or numbered scaffolding without a real sequence.
Don't add drop shadows for lift — step the tonal surface instead.
Don't let the Quiet Signal Graph become a second accent color system.
